summary: Tested ordering app (épicerie + restaurant, French UI). Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passed (categories, products, filters, search, product detail, orders create with delivery fee logic, list by guest sorted desc, 404/400/422 error paths). Frontend: full e2e mobile flow works on the public Expo web preview — Home (hero promo, categories carousel, populars list, promos list) → Catalogue (search input, category chips, 2-col product grid filtering) → Product detail (qty stepper, Ajouter button) → Cart (steppers, subtotal/delivery/total, Passer la commande) → Checkout (validates required fields via disabled CTA, POST /api/orders succeeds, success screen) → Commandes (order card shows status 'En préparation', date, total, items thumbnails). Floating cart and tab badge update reactively. Cart/guest_id persistence via storage confirmed indirectly through order creation + orders listing showing the new order. No mocked APIs. No red-screen errors. A few minor RN deprecation warnings observed in the browser console.

issues: Required-field validation relies solely on disabling the 'Confirmer la commande' CTA. No inline helper or error text appears until the user has filled some fields. Consider adding subtle helper text under inputs or a visible reason for the disabled state to improve UX (the code at checkout.tsx:36 sets a French error message but it's unreachable because the Pressable is `disabled` when canSubmit is false).

react_native_issues.issue: Expo doctor warnings on startup — expo@54.0.34 (expected ~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (expected ~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (expected ~6.0.24). Non-blocking but should be aligned. Reference: /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log

Browser console warns: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Originates from theme/shadow usage (likely /app/frontend/src/theme.ts shadows.card / shadows.floating used across home.tsx etc.). Replace shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius with boxShadow string for web compatibility.
Browser console warns: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Likely from a third-party (e.g., expo-linear-gradient/safe-area). Low priority; ignore if it comes from a library.

action_items: Optional UX: surface a small inline message under the disabled 'Confirmer la commande' button explaining which fields are required (the unreachable setError at /app/frontend/app/checkout.tsx:36 can be wired up by removing the `disabled` prop and relying on the existing canSubmit branch).
Align Expo SDK 54 patch versions: run `npx expo install expo expo-font expo-router` to upgrade to ~54.0.35 / ~14.0.12 / ~6.0.24.
Migrate `shadow*` style props in /app/frontend/src/theme.ts (shadows.card, shadows.floating) to the new `boxShadow` API so web preview stops printing deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated `@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown')` hooks (FastAPI lifespan API is preferred). Not breaking now but consider migrating.
server.py exposes `delivery_fee` as a Python literal 2.99 — fine for now but could be moved to a constant/env if business rules change.
Order.created_at is stored as ISO string — sorting works lexicographically only because timestamps include timezone. OK for current scope.
seed_data_creation: No manual seed needed — backend auto-seeds 8 categories and 18 products on startup if the collections are empty. Tests created a few TEST_ orders under a temporary guest_id; left in DB (no cleanup hook required for this stateless guest scenario).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://order-basket-5.preview.emergentagent.com. Mobile viewport 390x844 used. Key testIDs: home-screen, home-hero-promo, home-category-{id}, home-popular-{id}, home-add-{id}, home-promo-{id}, home-promo-add-{id}, home-floating-cart, cart-tab-badge, catalog-screen, catalog-search-input, catalog-chip-{id}, catalog-product-{id}, catalog-add-{id}, product-screen, product-inc, product-dec, product-qty, product-add-btn, cart-screen, cart-screen-empty, cart-empty-discover-btn, cart-item-{id}, cart-inc-{id}, cart-dec-{id}, cart-remove-{id}, cart-subtotal, cart-delivery, cart-total, cart-checkout-btn, checkout-screen, checkout-name, checkout-phone, checkout-address, checkout-notes, checkout-confirm-btn (disabled when required fields empty), checkout-error, checkout-success, checkout-view-orders, checkout-continue, orders-screen, order-card-{id}, orders-empty-discover, orders-retry-btn. To run backend tests: `cd /app && pytest backend/tests/test_api.py -v`.
